input: What is the maximum payload of the Acme R1 arm? If sources disagree, tell me which source is official.
description: Checks whether the agent handles disagreement between official specs and community FAQ.

soft_assertions.rubric: Pass only if the answer identifies the official datasheet value as 5 kg or 11 lb equivalent, and clearly labels the FAQ as unofficial if it mentions it.
Pass only if disagreement is disclosed faithfully and source quality is explained rather than flattened into one unsupported number.
